recommendations.title: Don 2
recommendations.overview: Having conquered the Asian underworld, crime boss Don sets in motion a plan that will give him dominion over Europe.

recommendations.title: Dil Chahta Hai
recommendations.overview: Three inseparable childhood friends are just out of college. Nothing comes between them - until they each fall in love, and their wildly different approaches to relationships creates tension.

recommendations.title: Don

recommendations.title: The Eight Hundred
recommendations.overview: In 1937, eight hundred Chinese soldiers fight under siege from a warehouse in the middle of the Shanghai battlefield, completely surrounded by the Japanese army.

recommendations.title: All Quiet on the Western Front

recommendations.title: Kingdom III: The Flame of Destiny
recommendations.overview: To defend their kingdom against a sudden invasion, a mighty general returns to the battlefield alongside a war orphan, now grown up, who dreams of glory.

recommendations.title: Wazir

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Kesari
recommendations.overview: In 1897, an army of 21 Sikhs battles 10,000 Afghans to prevent the Saragarhi Fort from being taken down.
